    {"repo": "kubernetes/kubernetes", "path": "staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/listwatch.go", "symbol": "NewListWatchFromClient"}
  ],
  "text": "The SharedInformer factory implementation in kubernetes/kubernetes is found in staging/src/k8s.io/client-go, which is a vendored copy of the k8s.io/client-go module. The implementation consists of three main components: (1) **Factory Registration and Orchestration**, (2) **Informer Registration by Type**, and (3) **Local Cache Store Sync Mechanism**.\n\n### Factory Registration and Orchestration\nThe core factory is implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/factory.go`. The `SharedInformerFactory` interface defines methods for creating and managing informers. The `sharedInformerFactory` struct maintains a map of `cache.SharedIndexInformer` objects organized by type, along with synchronization primitives and options for resync periods, namespace filtering, and list options tweaking. Key methods include `NewSharedInformerFactory()` for instantiation, `InformerFor()` for requesting informers for specific resource types, `Start()` for initializing all registered informers, `Shutdown()` for graceful termination, and `WaitForCacheSync()` for ensuring caches are populated.\n\nThe factory also implements the internal factory interface defined in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/internalinterfaces/factory_interfaces.go`, which provides the minimal interface needed by generated informer code.\n\n### Informer Registration by Type\nThe `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/generic.go` file provides the `GenericInformer` interface and `ForResource()` method on the factory, allowing dynamic resource lookup. Additionally, there are 197 informer registration files across multiple group and version subdirectories (admissionregistration, apps, batch, certificates, coordination, core, discovery, events, extensions, flowcontrol, networking, node, policy, rbac, resource, scheduling, storage, storagemigration, and their respective API versions). Each group has an `interface.go` file that defines the group-level factory interface, and each version has resource-specific files like `pod.go`, `deployment.go`, etc., that implement type-specific informer creation.\n\n### Local Cache Store Sync Mechanism\nThe SharedInformer core is implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/shared_informer.go`. The `sharedIndexInformer` struct combines three main components: (1) an `Indexer` for the local cache, (2) a `Controller` for driving the watch/list loop, and (3) a `sharedProcessor` for distributing events to registered handlers. The `Run()` method orchestrates the startup, creating a `DeltaFIFO` queue, configuring a `Controller` with a `Reflector`, and managing event distribution.\n\nThe list-watch mechanism is implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/listwatch.go`. The `ListerWatcher` interface combines `Lister` (for initial LIST operations) and `Watcher` (for WATCH operations). The `ListWatch` struct provides concrete implementations for watching API server resources via REST client, with support for field/label selectors and chunking.\n\nThe reflector, implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/reflector.go`, is the component that actually syncs the local cache with the API server. It periodically performs LIST operations to detect missed changes and WATCH operations for incremental updates, pushing all changes into a `DeltaFIFO` queue.\n\nThe cache store layer consists of: `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/store.go` (defining the `Store` and `Indexer` interfaces), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/index.go` (implementing indexing), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/thread_safe_store.go` (thread-safe wrapper), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/delta_fifo.go` (the queue that holds deltas), and `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/undelta_store.go` (for converting deltas back to object state).\n\nThe controller orchestration is handled in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/controller.go`, which drives the reflector and processes items from the DeltaFIFO via a `Process` callback function (typically `HandleDeltas` on the shared informer).\n\nAdditional supporting components include `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/synctrack/` for tracking sync state, `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/mutation_detector.go` for detecting invalid cache mutations, and various lister implementations in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/listers.go`."
}
EOF
cat /tmp/answer_prep.json

The `ListerWatcher` interface combines `Lister` (for initial LIST operations) and `Watcher` (for WATCH operations). The `ListWatch` struct provides concrete implementations for watching API server resources via REST client, with support for field/label selectors and chunking.\n\nThe reflector, implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/reflector.go`, is the component that actually syncs the local cache with the API server. It periodically performs LIST operations to detect missed changes and WATCH operations for incremental updates, pushing all changes into a `DeltaFIFO` queue.\n\nThe cache store layer consists of: `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/store.go` (defining the `Store` and `Indexer` interfaces), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/index.go` (implementing indexing), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/thread_safe_store.go` (thread-safe wrapper), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/delta_fifo.go` (the queue that holds deltas), and `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/undelta_store.go` (for converting deltas back to object state).\n\nThe controller orchestration is handled in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/controller.go`, which drives the reflector and processes items from the DeltaFIFO via a `Process` callback function (typically `HandleDeltas` on the shared informer).\n\nAdditional supporting components include `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/synctrack/` for tracking sync state, `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/mutation_detector.go` for detecting invalid cache mutations, and various lister implementations in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/listers.go`."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Kubernetes SharedInformer Factory and Cache Sync

## Your Task

Find all Go source files in kubernetes/kubernetes that implement the SharedInformer factory: the informer registration, the list-watch mechanism, and the local cache store sync with the API server.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the domain domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0, sg-evals/client-go--v0.32.0, sg-evals/api--v0.32.0, sg-evals/etcd-io-etcd.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/etcd-io-etcd` (etcd-io/etcd)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
I'll help you find all Go source files that implement the SharedInformer factory in kubernetes/kubernetes. Let me start by exploring the structure and understanding the codebase.
Now let me search for all Go files that are part of the SharedInformer factory implementation systematically:

Perfect! I've successfully created `/workspace/answer.json` with a comprehensive analysis of the SharedInformer factory implementation in kubernetes/kubernetes.

## Summary

The SharedInformer factory implementation consists of **27 core files** organized into three main components:

### 1. **Factory Registration and Orchestration** (4 files)
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/factory.go` - Main factory implementation with `SharedInformerFactory` interface and `sharedInformerFactory` struct
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/generic.go` - Generic resource dispatch mechanism
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/doc.go` - Documentation
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/internalinterfaces/factory_interfaces.go` - Internal factory interface

### 2. **List-Watch and Synchronization Mechanism** (6 files)
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/shared_informer.go` - Core SharedInformer implementation
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/listwatch.go` - List and Watch mechanisms
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/reflector.go` - Reflector for syncing with API server
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/reflector_metrics.go` - Reflector metrics
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/reflector_data_consistency_detector.go` - Data consistency detection
- `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/controller.go` - Controller orchestration

### 3. **Cache Store Implementation** (17 files)
Core store interfaces and implementations for managing the local cache:
- Delta FIFO queue, thread-safe store, indexing, heap queues, mutation detection, and sync tracking

### 4. **Type Registration**
Additionally, there are **197 informer registration files** across 18 API groups (admissionregistration, apps, batch, certificates, etc.) with multiple API versions each, enabling type-specific informer creation.

The answer file includes detailed symbols and call chains showing how these components integrate together.

The implementation consists of three main components: (1) **Factory Registration and Orchestration**, (2) **Informer Registration by Type**, and (3) **Local Cache Store Sync Mechanism**.\n\n### Factory Registration and Orchestration\nThe core factory is implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/factory.go`. The `SharedInformerFactory` interface defines methods for creating and managing informers. The `sharedInformerFactory` struct maintains a map of `cache.SharedIndexInformer` objects organized by type, along with synchronization primitives and options for resync periods, namespace filtering, and list options tweaking. Key methods include `NewSharedInformerFactory()` for instantiation, `InformerFor()` for requesting informers for specific resource types, `Start()` for initializing all registered informers, `Shutdown()` for graceful termination, and `WaitForCacheSync()` for ensuring caches are populated.\n\nThe factory also implements the internal factory interface defined in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/internalinterfaces/factory_interfaces.go`, which provides the minimal interface needed by generated informer code.\n\n### Informer Registration by Type\nThe `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/generic.go` file provides the `GenericInformer` interface and `ForResource()` method on the factory, allowing dynamic resource lookup. Additionally, there are 197 informer registration files across multiple group and version subdirectories (admissionregistration, apps, batch, certificates, coordination, core, discovery, events, extensions, flowcontrol, networking, node, policy, rbac, resource, scheduling, storage, storagemigration, and their respective API versions). Each group has an `interface.go` file that defines the group-level factory interface, and each version has resource-specific files like `pod.go`, `deployment.go`, etc., that implement type-specific informer creation.\n\n### Local Cache Store Sync Mechanism\nThe SharedInformer core is implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/shared_informer.go`. The `sharedIndexInformer` struct combines three main components: (1) an `Indexer` for the local cache, (2) a `Controller` for driving the watch/list loop, and (3) a `sharedProcessor` for distributing events to registered handlers. The `Run()` method orchestrates the startup, creating a `DeltaFIFO` queue, configuring a `Controller` with a `Reflector`, and managing event distribution.\n\nThe list-watch mechanism is implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/listwatch.go`. The `ListerWatcher` interface combines `Lister` (for initial LIST operations) and `Watcher` (for WATCH operations). The `ListWatch` struct provides concrete implementations for watching API server resources via REST client, with support for field/label selectors and chunking.\n\nThe reflector, implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/reflector.go`, is the component that actually syncs the local cache with the API server. It periodically performs LIST operations to detect missed changes and WATCH operations for incremental updates, pushing all changes into a `DeltaFIFO` queue.\n\nThe cache store layer consists of: `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/store.go` (defining the `Store` and `Indexer` interfaces), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/index.go` (implementing indexing), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/thread_safe_store.go` (thread-safe wrapper), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/delta_fifo.go` (the queue that holds deltas), and `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/undelta_store.go` (for converting deltas back to object state).\n\nThe controller orchestration is handled in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/controller.go`, which drives the reflector and processes items from the DeltaFIFO via a `Process` callback function (typically `HandleDeltas` on the shared informer).\n\nAdditional supporting components include `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/synctrack/` for tracking sync state, `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/mutation_detector.go` for detecting invalid cache mutations, and various lister implementations in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/listers.go`."
}

  "text": "The SharedInformer factory implementation in kubernetes/kubernetes is found in staging/src/k8s.io/client-go, which is a vendored copy of the k8s.io/client-go module. The implementation consists of three main components: (1) **Factory Registration and Orchestration**, (2) **Informer Registration by Type**, and (3) **Local Cache Store Sync Mechanism**.\n\n### Factory Registration and Orchestration\nThe core factory is implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/factory.go`. The `SharedInformerFactory` interface defines methods for creating and managing informers. The `sharedInformerFactory` struct maintains a map of `cache.SharedIndexInformer` objects organized by type, along with synchronization primitives and options for resync periods, namespace filtering, and list options tweaking. Key methods include `NewSharedInformerFactory()` for instantiation, `InformerFor()` for requesting informers for specific resource types, `Start()` for initializing all registered informers, `Shutdown()` for graceful termination, and `WaitForCacheSync()` for ensuring caches are populated.\n\nThe factory also implements the internal factory interface defined in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/internalinterfaces/factory_interfaces.go`, which provides the minimal interface needed by generated informer code.\n\n### Informer Registration by Type\nThe `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/informers/generic.go` file provides the `GenericInformer` interface and `ForResource()` method on the factory, allowing dynamic resource lookup. Additionally, there are 197 informer registration files across multiple group and version subdirectories (admissionregistration, apps, batch, certificates, coordination, core, discovery, events, extensions, flowcontrol, networking, node, policy, rbac, resource, scheduling, storage, storagemigration, and their respective API versions). Each group has an `interface.go` file that defines the group-level factory interface, and each version has resource-specific files like `pod.go`, `deployment.go`, etc., that implement type-specific informer creation.\n\n### Local Cache Store Sync Mechanism\nThe SharedInformer core is implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/shared_informer.go`. The `sharedIndexInformer` struct combines three main components: (1) an `Indexer` for the local cache, (2) a `Controller` for driving the watch/list loop, and (3) a `sharedProcessor` for distributing events to registered handlers. The `Run()` method orchestrates the startup, creating a `DeltaFIFO` queue, configuring a `Controller` with a `Reflector`, and managing event distribution.\n\nThe list-watch mechanism is implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/listwatch.go`. The `ListerWatcher` interface combines `Lister` (for initial LIST operations) and `Watcher` (for WATCH operations). The `ListWatch` struct provides concrete implementations for watching API server resources via REST client, with support for field/label selectors and chunking.\n\nThe reflector, implemented in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/reflector.go`, is the component that actually syncs the local cache with the API server. It periodically performs LIST operations to detect missed changes and WATCH operations for incremental updates, pushing all changes into a `DeltaFIFO` queue.\n\nThe cache store layer consists of: `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/store.go` (defining the `Store` and `Indexer` interfaces), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/index.go` (implementing indexing), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/thread_safe_store.go` (thread-safe wrapper), `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/delta_fifo.go` (the queue that holds deltas), and `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/undelta_store.go` (for converting deltas back to object state).\n\nThe controller orchestration is handled in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/controller.go`, which drives the reflector and processes items from the DeltaFIFO via a `Process` callback function (typically `HandleDeltas` on the shared informer).\n\nAdditional supporting components include `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/synctrack/` for tracking sync state, `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/mutation_detector.go` for detecting invalid cache mutations, and various lister implementations in `staging/src/k8s.io/client-go/tools/cache/listers.go`."
